request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know? Our allies are increasingly relying on us for their defense, but are we getting the support we deserve in return? A recent study shows that while we bear 70% of the burden in our key alliances, public opinion is shifting. Many are now questioning if our commitments are truly reciprocal. It's time to ask: are we being taken advantage of, or is this just the cost of leadership? #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
